rewritten_requirements: The system shall check if a person is an Indian citizen.
The system shall verify the details of an Indian citizen.
The system shall generate a unique health ID for registered Indian citizens.
The system shall activate an account upon successful login.
The system shall support after activation, the system shall allow users to either add old files or set permissions.
The system shall store added old files.
The system shall provide access to relevant authorities based on set permissions.
The system shall allow adding new files when permission is granted.
The system shall store all the information provided by users.
The system shall allow the government to access stored data to view details and prepare reports.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system checks if a person is an Indian citizen.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If the person is not an Indian citizen, they cannot continue.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system verifies the details of an Indian citizen.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Once the details are verified, the person registers using their ID and receives a unique health ID.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system generates a unique health ID for registered Indian citizens.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Using this ID, they sign in to their account.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system activates an account upon successful login.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If the login is successful, the account is activated.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: After activation, users can add old files or set permissions.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: After activation, the person has two options. They can either add their old files or continue by setting permissions.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system stores added old files.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If they choose to add old files, those files are stored.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system provides access to relevant authorities based on set permissions.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If they choose to set permissions, access is provided to the relevant authorities. After that, the person’s files may be accessed if permission is given. If permission is not given, nothing further happens.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system allows adding new files when permission is granted.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: When access is allowed, new files can be added, and everything is stored.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system stores all the information provided by users.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: All the information is finally stored, and the process ends.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The government can access stored data to view details and prepare reports.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: At the same time, the stored data can be accessed by the government to view details and prepare reports.
